name: relentless-inception
description: Bounded multi-model deliberation, generative fusion, adversarial gates, and execution handoff for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Fuse frontier models, then execute with evidence gates
interface.longDescription: A provider-neutral, cost-bounded deliberation control plane for Codex. It runs independent model seats, structured comparison, minority-preserving synthesis, and adversarial verification while keeping filesystem execution under Codex control.
defaultPrompt: Use Relentless Inception to solve this with maximum intelligence
Fuse independent frontier-model plans, then execute the strongest verified plan
Run an adversarial review gate on this implementation
